sb_prompt: DISCUSS HOW YOU AND THE OTHER CALLER KEEP UP ON CURRENT EVENTS.      DO YOU GET MOST OF YOUR NEWS FROM TVOR PEOPLE YOU KNOW?  ARE YOU SATISFIED WITH THE QUALITY OF COVERAGE?
turns: I try to keep up with current events by reading news online and listening to podcasts. I find that it's a good way to get a well-rounded understanding of what's going on in the world. How about you? Do you have a preferred method for staying informed?

I mostly get my news from social media and the occasional news article I come across. However, I find that the news can be very biased and not always accurate, so I try to fact-check and get multiple sources before forming an opinion.

I completely agree with you. It's important to be critical of the information we consume and make sure we're getting accurate and unbiased news. I think it's great that you're taking the initiative to fact-check and get multiple sources. I also try to do the same, especially when it comes to important issues.

Yeah, I think it's important to stay informed and knowledgeable about current events, especially with all the misinformation out there. It can be overwhelming at times, but I try to prioritize staying updated on news that affects me and my community. What about you? Do you have a particular interest in any specific issues or topics?
